{ "copy": "
{% include 'Pages Breadcrumb' %}

Setup Configuration 

This section is to help set the automated parameters for the approval system and the notification system.

{% entityform name: 'Commission Setup' %}
", "customjavascript": " ", "displayorder": 14, "enablerating": false, "enabletracking": false, "excludefromsearch": false, "feedbackpolicy": 756150000, "hiddenfromsitemap": true, "isroot": false, "pagetemplateid": "cd587cbe-a61f-4c11-a750-6d0235a784ef", "parentpageid": "362995e0-7dc5-4bbf-9595-062f468d2d44", "partialurl": "Setup", "publishingstateid": "2177b470-e9b1-4c6b-8f73-91dc8f4d21e9", "rootwebpageid": "e4c0967d-c896-24d8-112b-9cca36ce4dfd", "sharedpageconfiguration": false, "summary": "

This is a sample landing page designed to be a starting point for your website

", "title": "Setup" }
powerpagecomponent.name: Setup
powerpagecomponent.searchcontent:
Setup
{% include 'Pages Breadcrumb' %}

Setup Configuration 

This section is to help set the automated parameters for the approval system and the notification system.

{% entityform name: 'Commission Setup' %}
Setup
